description: Health Canada approved gemtuzumab ozogamicin  in combination with daunorubicin (DNR) and cytarabine (AraC) for the treatment of patients with previously untreated, de novo CD33-positive acute myeloid leukemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukemia.

indication.indication: Mylotarg (gemtuzumab ozogamicin for injection) is indicated for combination therapy with daunorubicin (DNR) and cytarabine (AraC) for the treatment of patients with previously untreated, de novo CD33-positive acute myeloid leukemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukemia.
